title: Incorporate revision comments
summary: Incorporated revision comments by rewriting the abstract, introduction, and Sections 2-4 around SVAR-reader language, recovered-shock orthogonality, residual-noise bias, no-noise DW refinement, and the information/noise-ratio robust construction.

user_inputs.text: Incorporate the new revision with many comments by carefully rewriting the abstract, introduction, and Sections 2, 3, and 4, then review the manuscript against the spirit of the comments.

agent_actions.description: Rewrote front-half manuscript prose and updated registry, planning surfaces, review log, and human-readable logs.

checks.description: python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with KnowledgeVault path warnings before closure
